case_title: MIRABEDI, A.S. "NOUSHIE" et al VS BLACK, LARRY et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIRABEDI, A.S. "NOUSHIE" GREEN, VALERIE G. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BLACK, LARRY HERNANDEZ, RODOLFO (RUDY) BLACK, MRS. (PROPERTY OWNER) $1,577.24 PRINCIPAL, $112.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,689.24, DEFENDANT WAIVED NO PROOF OF SERVICE. DEFENDANT'S HAVE JOINT AND SEVERAL LIABILITY. CASE DISMISSED AGAINST DEFENDANT MRS. BLACK STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PLAINTIFF'S FILE A CHANGE OF ADDRESS- NAME UPDATED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BLACK, LARRY
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TWICE BECAUSE SOFT- WARE DID NOT ALLOW FOR ONLY 2 DEFENDANTS TO BE SELECTED. 2ND FEE EXEMPTED. SEE JUDMNT. RE 3RD DEF
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF MAY-01-2006, OFF CALENDAR AS TO DEFENDANT BLACK, LARRY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BLACK, MRS. (PROPERTY OWNER)
PROOF OF SERVICE ON ORDER TO APPEAR FOR EXAMINATION, RETURNED TO COURT-NOT SERVED.
